description_long: This is a rectangular woven handbag with a natural, beige-toned straw or rattan exterior, featuring a subtle chevron or herringbone pattern throughout its surface. The front flap is gently curved and secured by a small, round metallic clasp at the center, providing both function and a touch of understated style. The body of the bag is slightly tapered towards the base, giving it a sleek, modern silhouette. The sides are thin and flat, indicating a slim profile suitable for carrying small personal items. There are no visible handles or straps, suggesting it is designed to be carried as a clutch. The overall appearance is minimalist and elegant, with no additional decorative elements or branding visible.
description: A slim, rectangular woven clutch handbag with a natural beige chevron pattern and a central metallic clasp. Minimalist and elegant, it features a curved front flap and no visible straps or decorations.
description_view_0: Front view shows the curved flap, central metallic clasp, and the woven chevron pattern.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the slim, flat profile and the overlapping flap closure.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the plain woven back with no visible closures or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thin profile and the layered construction of the flap.
attribute_strap_type: none visible; designed as a clutch with no handles or straps.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Front flap with a central metallic clasp closure.
